info.title: Komprai API
info.description: Documentação automática das rotas da API Komprai

get.description: Returns a localized greeting and the current region.
Proxies GET authentication requests to the better-auth handler.

post.description: Proxies POST authentication requests to the better-auth handler (sign-in, sign-up, sign-out, etc.).
Promotes the authenticated user to admin role. Dev/staging only — requires a static bootstrap token.
Sets a password for users who signed up via social login or magic link. Required before enabling TOTP two-factor authentication.

get.description: Returns the authenticated user's profile and active session.
Returns a localized greeting and the current region. Useful for confirming the API is reachable.
Returns all stores owned by the authenticated user. Admins receive all stores.

post.description: Creates a new store. Optionally associate it with an organization via organizationId.

get.description: Returns a single store by ID.

patch.description: Updates a store's name, description, or active status. Changing active triggers billing metering events.

delete.description: Permanently deletes a store and stops its billing metering.

get.description: Returns invoices for the authenticated user. Pass organizationId to retrieve org invoices.
Returns a single invoice by ID.
Returns up to 500 usage records for the authenticated user, sorted by most recent.
Returns all billing resource configurations defining rates per resource type.

post.description: Creates a new billing configuration for a resource type.

patch.description: Updates the rate, currency, description, or active status of a billing resource configuration.

get.description: Returns all invoices across all users and organizations.

post.description: Triggers invoice generation for a given billing period.

patch.description: Marks an invoice as void. Voided invoices are retained for audit purposes.

get.description: Returns active providers available in the current region.

post.description: Registers a new provider with a JSON configuration schema. Admin only.

get.description: Returns a single provider by ID.

patch.description: Updates provider metadata, allowed regions, or configuration schema. Admin only.

delete.description: Permanently deletes a provider. Admin only.

get.description: Returns all provider credentials associated with a store.

post.description: Creates encrypted credentials for a provider on a given store.

get.description: Returns a single provider credential by ID.

put.description: Replaces the encrypted configuration for an existing provider credential.

delete.description: Permanently deletes a provider credential from a store.

get.description: Returns all active deployment regions with pricing multipliers.

post.description: Creates a new deployment region. Admin only.

get.description: Returns a single region by ID.

patch.description: Updates a region's flag, location, pricing multiplier, or active status. Admin only.

delete.description: Permanently deletes a region. Admin only.

get.description: Checks whether an email domain requires SSO login.
Initiates the OIDC authorization flow and redirects to the identity provider.
OIDC redirect callback. Validates the code, provisions the user, and sets a session cookie.
Returns the OIDC configuration for an organization.

post.description: Upserts the OIDC provider configuration. All email domains must be verified first.

delete.description: Removes the OIDC configuration, disabling SSO for the organization.

get.description: Returns all domain verification records with DNS TXT challenge details.

post.description: Registers a domain for DNS verification. Returns the TXT record to publish.
Triggers a DNS TXT lookup to verify domain ownership.

patch.description: Toggles allowAutoEnroll on a verified domain.

delete.description: Removes a domain from the organization's verified domain list.

get.description: Returns all reports owned by the authenticated user.

post.description: Creates a new report with a query definition and visualization config.

get.description: Returns a single report by ID.

patch.description: Updates a report's name, description, type, query, or visualization config.

get.description: Returns all dashboards owned by the authenticated user.

post.description: Creates a new dashboard with an optional initial set of widgets.

get.description: Returns a dashboard with fully expanded report data for each widget.

patch.description: Updates a dashboard's name, description, or widget layout.

delete.description: Permanently deletes a dashboard and all its widgets.
